market_pulse: Competitive venues emphasizing social proof through influencer partnerships and user-generated content; Tech-house and EDM lineups dominate weekend bookings across Wynn/Caesars properties.

content_gaps.description: Competitor venues regularly feature guest list promoter content and behind-the-scenes creator partnerships; LIV could amplify micro-influencer takeovers.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Schedule weekly guest promoter features and creator takeovers on TikTok Stories.

content_gaps.description: Competitors leverage branded hashtags (#omnialasvegas, #xsvegas) in UGC; minimal LIV-specific hashtag consistency across platforms.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch #MeetUnderTheHalo campaign incentive (free entry/bottle service discount for tagged posts).

content_gaps.description: Weekend countdown content (Fri/Sat prep vibes) generates high engagement; limited LIV video series for upcoming DJ drops.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Produce 3-5 short countdown reels per weekend highlighting upcoming talent.

influencer_activity.mention: Honest review of LIV Nightclub & XS Nightclub on guest list with backstage access; high production quality travel content. Reach: 591+ likes, 61 comments on LIV review video.
High-reach Vegas club promoter with 2.3M likes on OMNIA/Hakkasan content; drives narrative around iconic venue architecture (chandelier, design).
XS/Encore promoter with 176K followers; consistent guest list and VIP service posts.
